description_long: This is a large, black plastic garbage bag with a glossy, slightly wrinkled surface, reflecting light in patches across its exterior. The bag is tightly gathered and secured at the top with a visible knot, creating pronounced folds and creases radiating downward. Its body is irregularly shaped, bulging outward in several areas, suggesting it is filled with mixed refuse or soft, irregular contents. The plastic material appears thin but strong, with subtle marbling and streaks of grayish highlights. No printed labels, logos, or text are visible on the exterior. The bag is shown resting directly on the ground, with its base spreading out slightly due to the weight of its contents.
description: A large, glossy black plastic garbage bag, tightly knotted at the top and bulging with contents, resting on the ground.
description_view_0: The bag appears wide and squat, with the knot and gathered top clearly visible and the base spreading out to the right.
description_view_1: This view shows the bag more upright, emphasizing its height and the pronounced bulge in the lower half.
description_view_2: The bag looks rounded and full, with the knot at the top and a slight taper toward the bottom left corner.
description_view_3: The bag appears more compressed and elongated, with the knot and folds at the top clearly defined and the base extending to the left.
attribute_fullness_or_bulging: bulging and moderately overfilled, with pronounced surface tension and irregular bulges
